EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IDynamicSurface3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members that utilize Terrain surfaces.

[Guid("9DC0A59E-494E-41B6-BE82-F283E3431577")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IDynamicSurface3 : IDynamicSurface2, IDynamicSurface

bool CanDoCurvature { get; }

bool

ZFactor

Multiplication factor applied to all z values to provide unit-congruency between coordinate components.

double ZFactor { get; set; }
